files.name: Files on Repository
files.description: Collects and records all source files in the repository by their path.

classes-per-file.name: Classes Per File
classes-per-file.description: Analyzes each source file to identify and record all top-level classes defined

file-coupling.name: File Coupling
file-coupling.description: Measures file-level coupling by computing each file’s fan-in (dependent files) and fan-out (dependencies)

dependency-centrality.name: Dependency Centrality
dependency-centrality.description: Computes in-degree, out-degree, and degree centrality from the file dependency graph

functions-per-file.name: Functions Per File
functions-per-file.description: Records all named functions in each source file, mapping function names to their AST node

function-coupling.name: Function Coupling
function-coupling.description: Measures function-level coupling by recording Fan-In and Fan-Out relationships between functions

function-dependency-summary.name: Function Dependency Summary
function-dependency-summary.description: Aggregates fan-in and fan-out dependency totals for each named function

function-length.name: Function Length
function-length.description: Counts line spans for named functions in each source file

import-instability.name: Import Instability
import-instability.description: Computes afferent and efferent coupling from file imports and derives instability I = Ce / (Ca + Ce)

class-coupling.name: Class Coupling
class-coupling.description: Analyzes each class to identify Fan-Out and Fan-In

class-dependency-summary.name: Class Dependency Summary
class-dependency-summary.description: Aggregates fan-in and fan-out dependency totals for each class across its methods

lines-per-file.name: Lines Per File
lines-per-file.description: Counts total and non-empty lines for each analyzed source file

parameter-count.name: Parameter Count
parameter-count.description: Counts declared parameters for each named function in each source file
